rationale: The proposed change to Tax Code §11.13(b) homestead exemption has no relation to Elec. Code §273.023, which governs subpoena procedures for prosecutions. No conflict exists.
quote: Sec. 273.023. SUBPOENA. (a) A subpoena or subpoena duces tecum issued in connection with a prosecution under this subchapter is effective if served anywhere in this state.
_note: Rule text concerns election code subpoena authority; proposed change concerns property tax homestead exemption. No overlap.
